---
title: "Analysis_TWD"
output: html_document
---
```{R}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
```

Read in the TWD data
```{R}
raw_TWD_data <- read_csv("../data/bern_data/TWD/tn_timeseries_L2_2025-01-01_2026-03-18_6b3befc5-6a20-4e8c-ba2b-11dbd0950788.csv")
```

Read in the metadata
```{R}
metadata_TWD <- read_csv("../data/bern_data/TWD/tn_metadata_L2_2025-01-01_2026-03-18_6b3befc5-6a20-4e8c-ba2b-11dbd0950788.csv")
```

Aggregate to daily data
```{R}
df_daily_TWD <- raw_TWD_data |> 
  mutate(date = as_date(ts)) |>
  group_by(date, series_id) |>
  summarise(
    
    TWD_mean = mean(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_median = median(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_min = min(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_max = max(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

Filter daily data to time period Apr.-Oct. 2025
```{R}
df_daily_TWD <- df_daily_TWD|>
  filter(month(date) >= 4, month(date) <= 10 ) |> # data for Apr.-Oct.2025
  left_join(metadata_TWD, by = "series_id")
  
```

## Plot TWD per tree
**Plot of mean TWD:**
```{R}
df_daily_TWD <- df_daily_TWD |>
  mutate(series_label = paste0(tree_name)) |>
  filter(month(date) >= 4, month(date) <= 10 ) # data for Apr.-Oct.2025

p <- ggplot(df_daily_TWD, aes(x = date, y = TWD_mean))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(~ series_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5)+
    scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean TWD [µm]"
  )
  
print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/TWD_mean_plot.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 20,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 400
)

q <- ggplot(df_daily_TWD, aes(x = date, y = TWD_median))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(~ series_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5)+
    scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Median TWD [µm]"
  )
print(q)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/TWD_median_plot.png",
  plot = q,
  width = 20,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 400
)
```

## Plot mean TWD per tree species
Calculate mean TWD per tree species
```{R}
df_daily_TWD_species <- raw_TWD_data |>
  left_join(metadata_TWD, by = "series_id")

df_daily_TWD_species <- df_daily_TWD_species |> 
  mutate(date = as_date(ts)) |>
  filter(month(date) >= 4, month(date) <= 10 ) |> # data for Apr.-Oct.2025
  group_by(date, tree_genus_species) |>
  summarise(
    TWD_mean = mean(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_median = median(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_min = min(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_max = max(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

**Plot of mean TWD:**
```{R}
p <- ggplot(df_daily_TWD_species, aes(x = date, y = TWD_mean))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(~ tree_genus_species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5)+
    scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean TWD [µm]"
  )
print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/TWD_mean_species_plot.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 20,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 400
)
```

## Plot mean TWD per site and species combination
Calculate mean TWD per site and species
```{R}
daily_TWD_site <- raw_TWD_data |>
  mutate(date = as_date(ts)) |>
  filter(month(date) >= 4, month(date) <= 10 ) |> # data for Apr.-Oct.2025
  left_join(metadata_TWD, by = "series_id")|>
  mutate(site = str_sub(tree_name, -2, -1)) |>
  group_by(date, site, tree_genus_species) |>
  summarise(
    
    TWD_mean = mean(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_median = median(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_min = min(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    TWD_max = max(twd, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
  
```

**Plot per site and species:**
```{R}
p <- ggplot(daily_TWD_site, aes(x = date, y = TWD_mean))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(vars(tree_genus_species, site), scales = "free_y", ncol = 5)+
    scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b"
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean TWD [µm]"
  )
print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "../figures/TWD_mean_species_site_plot.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 20,
  height = 12,
  dpi = 400
)
```
